message:
chore(deps): relax unicode-width version constraint

Changed unicode-width dependency version from exact "0.2.2" to relaxed "0.2"
to allow minor version updates within the 0.2.x series. This follows Cargo's
semantic versioning best practices where "0.2" is equivalent to "^0.2.0" and
will accept any version >= 0.2.0 and < 0.3.0.

Benefits:
- Allows automatic updates to patch releases (0.2.3, 0.2.4, etc.)
- Reduces dependency conflicts when other crates depend on newer 0.2.x versions
- Maintains compatibility guarantees within the 0.2 minor version series
- Follows standard Cargo dependency specification patterns

The relaxed constraint maintains the same compatibility guarantees while
providing more flexibility for the dependency resolver. No API changes are
expected within the 0.2.x series per semantic versioning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ regex = "1.12"
 crossterm = "0.29"
 
 # Unicode character cell width calculation
-unicode-width = "0.2.2"
+unicode-width = "0.2"
 
 # LRU cache for color parsing and style computation
 lru = "0.16"
